query:
-- 专门查询重庆城市的所有合伙人记录
SELECT 
  p.id as partnerId,
  p.userId,
  p.name as partnerName,
  p.phone as partnerPhone,
  p.isActive as partnerIsActive,
  p.createdAt as partnerCreatedAt,
  pc.id as partnerCityId,
  pc.cityId,
  c.name as cityName,
  pc.contractStatus,
  pc.createdAt as partnerCityCreatedAt,
  u.id as actualUserId,
  u.name as userName,
  u.phone as userPhone,
  u.isActive as userIsActive
FROM partner_cities pc
LEFT JOIN partners p ON p.id = pc.partnerId
LEFT JOIN cities c ON c.id = pc.cityId
LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = p.userId
WHERE c.name = '重庆'
ORDER BY pc.createdAt DESC;

  u.id as actualUserId,
  u.name as userName,
  u.phone as userPhone,
  u.isActive as userIsActive
FROM partner_cities pc
LEFT JOIN partners p ON p.id = pc.partnerId
LEFT JOIN cities c ON c.id = pc.cityId
LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = p.userId
WHERE c.name = '重庆'
ORDER BY pc.createdAt DESC;
